system.description: The Librarian throws out his arm and hurls a blazing crimson lance that impales anything in its path. The Blood Lance traces a straight line from the Librarian out to the extent of the power's range. Any creature (friend or foe) that the lance passes through suffers 1d10 x PR Rending damage that is not reduced by Toughness Bonus. Armour and cover protect as normal.
